doc.title: Senior Developer Standard
doc.description: Production-ready code quality standards for all development tasks

rules.rule: Use descriptive camelCase for variables/functions, PascalCase for classes
Define custom error classes (ValidationError, NetworkError, BusinessLogicError)
Always validate input at boundaries
Use async/await with proper error handling
No magic numbers - use named constants
Functions must have single responsibility
Maintain 70%+ test coverage
Use JSDoc for all public APIs
Sanitize logs - never log secrets or PII
Use environment variables for configuration

doc.title: Clean Architecture
doc.description: System design with clear separation of concerns

rules.rule: Dependencies point inward: framework → use cases → entities
Inner layers define contracts, outer layers implement them
Business logic lives in domain/entities layer
Use dependency injection for testability
Define repository interfaces for data access
Use value objects for complex domain values
Implement use cases for business operations
Keep infrastructure concerns outside domain logic
Use events for cross-boundary communication
Target O(n) or better time complexity
Use Set for O(1) membership lookup
Avoid N+1 queries - use JOIN or batch loading
Implement caching layers for frequent data access
Use lazy loading for large datasets
Run parallel operations with Promise.all
Profile before optimizing
Use connection pooling for databases
Memoize expensive function calls
Keep UI operations under 16ms
